list.name: Add
list.comment: TextField: Simply animations added, JavaDocs added.

task.summary: Added animations, JavaDocs, Selection Colot Font.
TextField: Simply animations added, JavaDocs added.
TextField: Fix exception which thrown in updateColor
Track Metadata View: New view type of window
UI Package: New style window. Migrate from native window to inside application form (Dialog.class)
Scripts: Minor updates in bat script. Added bash script for launch and build DWM1.dll
Res Layouts: New view style in FXML's
Plugin Host Controller: Add plugin in thread thrown error. Add plugin moved from thread to main thread
Dialogs, SoundSlider, Art and more: New java docs added
ListCells: New view and minor optimization
UI: Minor view style and animations update
Root: Tooltips now handle inside Platform thread
VstPluginListCell: Re open button was removed
New Java-Docs and minor update in all project (scripts, src, tests, etc.)
Minor refactor in TempoShifter.java and tempo_shifter.cpp

MESSAGE.value: Track Metadata View: New view type of window
UI Package: New style window. Migrate from native window to inside application form (Dialog.class)
Scripts: Minor updates in bat script. Added bash script for launch and build DWM1.dll
ListCellPlaylist: Fixed padding insets
Res Layouts: New view style in FXML's
Plugin Host Controller: Add plugin in thread thrown error. Add plugin moved from thread to main thread
Anvil: Now available for modifications (non-finale)
Readme: Updated minor things
ListCells: Optimize for list's
AudioHost: Fixed freeze open animation
Dialogs, SoundSlider, Art and more: New java docs added
ListCells: New view and minor optimization (needs testing)
ListCells: New view and minor optimization
UI: Minor view style and animations update
Version file updated
Root: Tooltips now handle inside Platform thread
VstPluginListCell: Re open button was removed
Minor updates in all project
New Java-Docs and minor update in all project (scripts, src, tests, etc.)
Readme updated
Updates Scripts, Added new Java-Docs.
Minor refactor in TempoShifter.java and tempo_shifter.cpp
Root: LicenseDialog updated to AnimationDialog
Documentation html page created
TempoShifter update to more optimize
